revision.comment: added about ahmadiyya text becuase ahmadis are also significant distinct religious group like mormom and bahais
revision.text:
{{ navbox | name = Religious books | title = [[Religious text|Religious texts]] ([[List of religious texts|List]]) | listclass = hlist | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| group1 = [[Ancient history|Antiquity]]
| list1 = *[[Pyramid Texts]] (Egyptian religion) *[[Vedas]] (Hinduism) *[[Jain Agamas (Digambara)|Agamas]] (Jainism) *[[Avesta]] (Zoroastrian) *''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' and ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' (Taoist) *[[Tripiṭaka]] (Buddhist) *[[Bible]] (Judaism, Christianity) **[[Hebrew Bible|Tanakh]] (Judaism) ***[[Samaritan Pentateuch|Samaritan Torah]] (Samaritanism) ***[[Deuterocanonical books|Deuterocanon]] (Roman Catholicism, Eastern Christianity) **[[New Testament]] (Christianity) *[[Bhagavad Gita]] (Hinduism) *''[[Metamorphoses]]'' (Roman polytheism) *[[Nag Hammadi library]] (Gnosticism) *[[Talmud]] (Judaism) *[[Theogony]] (Greek polytheism) *[[Upanishads]] (Hinduism) *[[The Enneads|Enneads]] (Neoplatonism) *[[Divine Liturgy]] (Eastern Christianity)
| group2 = [[Middle Ages|Medieval]] |list2= *[[Puranas]] (Hinduism) **[[Puya (Meitei texts)|Puya]] (Sanamahism) *[[Quran]] (Islam) *[[Kojiki]] (Shinto) *[[Ambrosian hymns|Ambrosian Hymnal]] (Roman Catholicism) * [[Hadith]] (Islam) *[[Summa Theologica]] (Roman Catholicism) |group3=[[Early modern]] |list3= *[[Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh) *[[Luther's Large Catechism]] (Lutheranism) *[[Augsburg Confession]] (Protestantism) *[[Heidelberg Catechism]] (Protestantism) *''[[Book of Common Prayer]]'' (Anglicanism) *[[Roman Missal]] (Roman Catholicism) *[[Roman Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism)
| group4 = [[Modernity|Modern]] |list4= *[[Book of Mormon]] (Mormonism) *[[Ofudesaki]] (Tenrikyo) *''[[Kitáb-i-Aqdas]]'' (Baha'i) *[[Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya]] (Ahmadiyya) *''[[Liber AL vel Legis]]'' (Thelemite) *[[Book of Shadows]] (Wiccan) *''[[Dianetics: The Modern Science of Mental Health|Dianetics]]'' (Scientologist) *''[[The Satanic Bible]]'' (Satanist) *[[Geniocracy]] (Raelian) * [[Catechism of the Catholic Church|Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism) }} <noinclude> [[Category:Religious book templates]] </noinclude>

{{ navbox | name = Religious books | title = [[Religious text|Religious texts]] ([[List of religious texts|List]]) | listclass = hlist | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| group1 = [[Ancient history|Antiquity]]
| list1 = *[[Pyramid Texts]] (Egyptian religion) *[[Vedas]] (Hinduism) *[[Jain Agamas (Digambara)|Agamas]] (Jainism) *[[Avesta]] (Zoroastrian) *''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' and ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' (Taoist) *[[Tripiṭaka]] (Buddhist) *[[Bible]] (Judaism, Christianity) **[[Hebrew Bible|Tanakh]] (Judaism) ***[[Samaritan Pentateuch|Samaritan Torah]] (Samaritanism) ***[[Deuterocanonical books|Deuterocanon]] (Roman Catholicism, Eastern Christianity) **[[New Testament]] (Christianity) *[[Bhagavad Gita]] (Hinduism) *''[[Metamorphoses]]'' (Roman polytheism) *[[Nag Hammadi library]] (Gnosticism) *[[Talmud]] (Judaism) *[[Theogony]] (Greek polytheism) *[[Upanishads]] (Hinduism) *[[The Enneads|Enneads]] (Neoplatonism) *[[Divine Liturgy]] (Eastern Christianity)
| group2 = [[Middle Ages|Medieval]] |list2= *[[Puranas]] (Hinduism) **[[Puya (Meitei texts)|Puya]] (Sanamahism) *[[Quran]] (Islam) *[[Kojiki]] (Shinto) *[[Ambrosian hymns|Ambrosian Hymnal]] (Roman Catholicism) * [[Hadith]] (Islam) *[[Summa Theologica]] (Roman Catholicism) |group3=[[Early modern]] |list3= *[[Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh) *[[Luther's Large Catechism]] (Lutheranism) *[[Augsburg Confession]] (Protestantism) *[[Heidelberg Catechism]] (Protestantism) *''[[Book of Common Prayer]]'' (Anglicanism) *[[Roman Missal]] (Roman Catholicism) *[[Roman Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism)
| group4 = [[Modernity|Modern]] |list4= *[[Book of Mormon]] (Mormonism) *[[Ofudesaki]] (Tenrikyo) *''[[Kitáb-i-Aqdas]]'' (Baha'i) *[[Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya]] (Ahmadiyya) *''[[Liber AL vel Legis]]'' (Thelemite) *[[Book of Shadows]] (Wiccan) *''[[Dianetics: The Modern Science of Mental Health|Dianetics]]'' (Scientologist) *''[[The Satanic Bible]]'' (Satanist) *[[Geniocracy]] (Raelian) * [[Catechism of the Catholic Church|Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism) }} <noinclude> [[Category:Religious book templates]] </noinclude>

| group4 = [[Modernity|Modern]] |list4= *[[Book of Mormon]] (Mormonism) *[[Ofudesaki]] (Tenrikyo) *''[[Kitáb-i-Aqdas]]'' (Baha'i) *[[Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya]] (Ahmadiyya) *''[[Liber AL vel Legis]]'' (Thelemite) *[[Book of Shadows]] (Wiccan) *''[[Dianetics: The Modern Science of Mental Health|Dianetics]]'' (Scientologist) *''[[The Satanic Bible]]'' (Satanist) *[[Geniocracy]] (Raelian) * [[Catechism of the Catholic Church|Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism) }} <noinclude>
</noinclude>

| list1 = *[[Pyramid Texts]] (Egyptian religion) *[[Vedas]] (Hinduism) *[[Jain Agamas (Digambara)|Agamas]] (Jainism) *[[Avesta]] (Zoroastrian) *''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' and ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' (Taoist) *[[Tripiṭaka]] (Buddhist) *[[:en:Bible|Bible]] (Judaism, Christianity) **[[Hebrew Bible|Tanakh]] (Judaism) ***[[Samaritan Pentateuch|Samaritan Torah]] (Samaritanism) ***[[:en:Deuterocanonical books|Deuterocanon]] (Roman Catholicism, Eastern Christianity) **[[New Testament]] (Christianity) *[[:en:Bhagavad Gita|Bhagavad Gita]] (Hinduism) *''[[Metamorphoses]]'' (Roman polytheism) *[[Nag Hammadi library]] (Gnosticism) *[[Talmud]] (Judaism) *[[Theogony]] (Greek polytheism) *[[Upanishads]] (Hinduism) *[[The Enneads|Enneads]] (Neoplatonism) *[[Divine Liturgy]] (Eastern Christianity)
| group2 = [[Middle Ages|Medieval]] |list2= *[[Puranas]] (Hinduism) **[[Puya (Meitei texts)|Puya]] (Sanamahism) *[[Quran]] (Islam) *[[Kojiki]] (Shinto) *[[:en:Ambrosian hymns|Ambrosian Hymnal]] (Roman Catholicism) * [[Hadith]] (Islam) *[[Summa Theologica]] (Roman Catholicism) |group3=[[:en:Early modern|Early modern]] |list3= *[[Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh) *[[Luther's Large Catechism]] (Lutheranism) *[[Augsburg Confession]] (Protestantism) *[[Heidelberg Catechism]] (Protestantism) *''[[Book of Common Prayer]]'' (Anglicanism) *[[Roman Missal]] (Roman Catholicism) *[[Roman Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism)
| group4 = [[Modernity|Modern]] |list4= *[[Book of Mormon]] (Mormonism) *[[Ofudesaki]] (Tenrikyo) *''[[Kitáb-i-Aqdas]]'' (Baha'i) *[[:en:Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya|Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya]] (Ahmadiyya) *''[[Liber AL vel Legis]]'' (Thelemite) *[[Book of Shadows]] (Wiccan) *''[[Dianetics: The Modern Science of Mental Health|Dianetics]]'' (Scientologist) *''[[The Satanic Bible]]'' (Satanist) *[[Geniocracy]] (Raelian) * [[:en:Catechism of the Catholic Church|Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism) }} <noinclude>
</noinclude>

| list1 = *[[Pyramid Texts]] (Egyptian religion) *[[Vedas]] (Hinduism) *[[Jain Agamas (Digambara)|Agamas]] (Jainism) *[[:en:Avesta|Avesta]] (Zoroastrian) *''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' and ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' (Taoist) *[[Tripiṭaka]] (Buddhist) *[[:en:Bible|Bible]] (Judaism, Christianity) **[[Hebrew Bible|Tanakh]] (Judaism) ***[[Samaritan Pentateuch|Samaritan Torah]] (Samaritanism) ***[[:en:Deuterocanonical books|Deuterocanon]] (Roman Catholicism, Eastern Christianity) **[[New Testament]] (Christianity) *[[:en:Bhagavad Gita|Bhagavad Gita]] (Hinduism) *''[[Metamorphoses]]'' (Roman polytheism) *[[Nag Hammadi library]] (Gnosticism) *[[Talmud]] (Judaism) *[[Theogony]] (Greek polytheism) *[[Upanishads]] (Hinduism) *[[The Enneads|Enneads]] (Neoplatonism) *[[:en:Divine Liturgy|Divine Liturgy]] (Eastern Christianity)
| group2 = [[Middle Ages|Medieval]] |list2= *[[Puranas]] (Hinduism) **[[Puya (Meitei texts)|Puya]] (Sanamahism) *[[Quran]] (Islam) *[[Kojiki]] (Shinto) *[[:en:Ambrosian hymns|Ambrosian Hymnal]] (Roman Catholicism) * [[Hadith]] (Islam) *[[Summa Theologica]] (Roman Catholicism) |group3=[[:en:Early modern|Early modern]] |list3= *[[:en:Guru Granth Sahib|Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh) *[[Luther's Large Catechism]] (Lutheranism) *[[:en:Augsburg Confession|Augsburg Confession]] (Protestantism) *[[Heidelberg Catechism]] (Protestantism) *''[[:en:Book of Common Prayer|Book of Common Prayer]]'' (Anglicanism) *[[Roman Missal]] (Roman Catholicism) *[[Roman Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism)
| group4 = [[Modernity|Modern]] |list4= *[[:en:Book of Mormon|Book of Mormon]] (Mormonism) *[[Ofudesaki]] (Tenrikyo) *''[[Kitáb-i-Aqdas]]'' (Baha'i) *[[:en:Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya|Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya]] (Ahmadiyya) *''[[Liber AL vel Legis]]'' (Thelemite) *[[:en:Book of Shadows|Book of Shadows]] (Wiccan) *''[[:en:Dianetics: The Modern Science of Mental Health|Dianetics]]'' (Scientologist) *''[[The Satanic Bible]]'' (Satanist) *[[:en:Geniocracy|Geniocracy]] (Raelian) * [[:en:Catechism of the Catholic Church|Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism) }} <noinclude>
</noinclude>

| list1 = *[[Pyramid Texts]] (Egyptian religion) *[[Vedas]] (Hinduism) *[[:en:Jain Agamas (Digambara)|Agamas]] (Jainism) *[[:en:Avesta|Avesta]] (Zoroastrian) *''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' and ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' (Taoist) *[[Tripiṭaka]] (Buddhist) *[[:en:Bible|Bible]] (Judaism, Christianity) **[[:en:Hebrew Bible|Tanakh]] (Judaism) ***[[Samaritan Pentateuch|Samaritan Torah]] (Samaritanism) ***[[:en:Deuterocanonical books|Deuterocanon]] (Roman Catholicism, Eastern Christianity) **[[:en:New Testament|New Testament]] (Christianity) *[[:en:Bhagavad Gita|Bhagavad Gita]] (Hinduism) *''[[:en:Metamorphoses|Metamorphoses]]'' (Roman polytheism) *[[:en:Nag Hammadi library|Nag Hammadi library]] (Gnosticism) *[[Talmud]] (Judaism) *[[Theogony]] (Greek polytheism) *[[Upanishads]] (Hinduism) *[[The Enneads|Enneads]] (Neoplatonism) *[[:en:Divine Liturgy|Divine Liturgy]] (Eastern Christianity)
| group2 = [[:en:Middle Ages|Medieval]] |list2= *[[:en:Puranas|Puranas]] (Hinduism) **[[:en:Puya (Meitei texts)|Puya]] (Sanamahism) *[[Quran]] (Islam) *[[Kojiki]] (Shinto) *[[:en:Ambrosian hymns|Ambrosian Hymnal]] (Roman Catholicism) * [[:en:Hadith|Hadith]] (Islam) *[[Summa Theologica]] (Roman Catholicism) |group3=[[:en:Early modern|Early modern]] |list3= *[[:en:Guru Granth Sahib|Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh) *[[:en:Luther's Large Catechism|Luther's Large Catechism]] (Lutheranism) *[[:en:Augsburg Confession|Augsburg Confession]] (Protestantism) *[[:en:Heidelberg Catechism|Heidelberg Catechism]] (Protestantism) *''[[:en:Book of Common Prayer|Book of Common Prayer]]'' (Anglicanism) *[[Roman Missal]] (Roman Catholicism) *[[Roman Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism)

| group2 = [[:en:Middle Ages|Medieval]] |list2= *[[:en:Puranas|Puranas]] (Hinduism) **[[:en:Puya (Meitei texts)|Puya]] (Sanamahism) *[[:en:Quran|Quran]] (Islam) *[[Kojiki]] (Shinto) *[[:en:Ambrosian hymns|Ambrosian Hymnal]] (Roman Catholicism) * [[:en:Hadith|Hadith]] (Islam) *[[:en:Summa Theologica|Summa Theologica]] (Roman Catholicism) |group3=[[:en:Early modern|Early modern]] |list3= *[[:en:Guru Granth Sahib|Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh) *[[:en:Luther's Large Catechism|Luther's Large Catechism]] (Lutheranism) *[[:en:Augsburg Confession|Augsburg Confession]] (Protestantism) *[[:en:Heidelberg Catechism|Heidelberg Catechism]] (Protestantism) *''[[:en:Book of Common Prayer|Book of Common Prayer]]'' (Anglicanism) *[[:en:Roman Missal|Roman Missal]] (Roman Catholicism) *[[:en:Roman Catechism|Roman Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism)
| group4 = [[:en:Modernity|Modern]] |list4= *[[:en:Book of Mormon|Book of Mormon]] (Mormonism) *[[:en:Ofudesaki|Ofudesaki]] (Tenrikyo) *''[[:en:Kitáb-i-Aqdas|Kitáb-i-Aqdas]]'' (Baha'i) *[[:en:Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya|Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya]] (Ahmadiyya) *''[[:en:Liber AL vel Legis|Liber AL vel Legis]]'' (Thelemite) *[[:en:Book of Shadows|Book of Shadows]] (Wiccan) *''[[:en:Dianetics: The Modern Science of Mental Health|Dianetics]]'' (Scientologist) *''[[:en:The Satanic Bible|The Satanic Bible]]'' (Satanist) *[[:en:Geniocracy|Geniocracy]] (Raelian) * [[:en:Catechism of the Catholic Church|Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism) }} <noinclude>
</noinclude>

{{ navbox | name = Religious books | title = [[:en:Religious text|Religious texts]] ([[:en:List of religious texts#Christianity|List]]) | listclass = hlist | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | group1 = [[:en:Ancient history|Antiquity]]
| list1 = *[[:en:Pyramid Texts|Pyramid Texts]] (Egyptian religion) *[[:en:Vedas|Vedas]] (Hinduism) *[[:en:Jain Agamas (Digambara)|Agamas]] (Jainism) *[[:en:Avesta|Avesta]] (Zoroastrian) *''[[:en:Tao Te Ching|Tao Te Ching]]'' and ''[[:en:Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' (Taoist) *[[:en:Tripiṭaka|Tripiṭaka]] (Buddhist) *[[:en:Bible|Bible]] (Judaism, Christianity) **[[:en:Hebrew Bible|Tanakh]] (Judaism) ***[[:en:Samaritan Pentateuch|Samaritan Torah]] (Samaritanism) ***[[:en:Deuterocanonical books|Deuterocanon]] (Roman Catholicism, Eastern Christianity) **[[:en:New Testament|New Testament]] (Christianity) *[[:en:Bhagavad Gita|Bhagavad Gita]] (Hinduism) *''[[:en:Metamorphoses|Metamorphoses]]'' (Roman polytheism) *[[:en:Nag Hammadi library|Nag Hammadi library]] (Gnosticism) *[[:en:Talmud|Talmud]] (Judaism) *[[:en:Theogony|Theogony]] (Greek polytheism) *[[:en:Upanishads|Upanishads]] (Hinduism) *[[:en:The Enneads|Enneads]] (Neoplatonism) *[[:en:Divine Liturgy|Divine Liturgy]] (Eastern Christianity)
| group2 = [[:en:Middle Ages|Medieval]] |list2= *[[:en:Puranas|Puranas]] (Hinduism) **[[:en:Puya (Meitei texts)|Puya]] (Sanamahism) *[[:en:Quran|Quran]] (Islam) *[[Kojiki]] (Shinto) *[[:en:Ambrosian hymns|Ambrosian Hymnal]] (Roman Catholicism) * [[:en:Hadith|Hadith]] (Islam) *[[:en:Summa Theologica|Summa Theologica]] (Roman Catholicism) |group3=[[:en:Early modern|Early modern]] |list3= *[[:en:Guru Granth Sahib|Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh) *[[:en:Luther's Large Catechism|Luther's Large Catechism]] (Lutheranism) *[[:en:Augsburg Confession|Augsburg Confession]] (Protestantism) *[[:en:Heidelberg Catechism|Heidelberg Catechism]] (Protestantism) *''[[:en:Book of Common Prayer|Book of Common Prayer]]'' (Anglicanism) *[[:en:Roman Missal|Roman Missal]] (Roman Catholicism) *[[:en:Roman Catechism|Roman Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism)
| group4 = [[:en:Modernity|Modern]] |list4= *[[:en:Book of Mormon|Book of Mormon]] (Mormonism) *[[:en:Ofudesaki|Ofudesaki]] (Tenrikyo) *''[[:en:Kitáb-i-Aqdas|Kitáb-i-Aqdas]]'' (Baha'i) *[[:en:Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya|Barahin-e-Ahmadiyya]] (Ahmadiyya) *''[[:en:Liber AL vel Legis|Liber AL vel Legis]]'' (Thelemite) *[[:en:Book of Shadows|Book of Shadows]] (Wiccan) *''[[:en:Dianetics: The Modern Science of Mental Health|Dianetics]]'' (Scientologist) *''[[:en:The Satanic Bible|The Satanic Bible]]'' (Satanist) *[[:en:Geniocracy|Geniocracy]] (Raelian) * [[:en:Catechism of the Catholic Church|Catechism]] (Roman Catholicism) }} <noinclude>
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
